common.topbarNotice: Authorized use only · sensitive values are masked by default

firstLaunch.title: Authorized use only
firstLaunch.noticeBody: AuthLens is designed for authorized systems only. Use it for internal debugging, QA, documentation, and authentication flow analysis. Unauthorized use against third-party services may violate laws or terms of service.
firstLaunch.policyBody: AuthLens never persists raw tokens, passwords, or cookies to local storage. They live in session memory for analysis and are stripped before being saved. The UI and report exports default to masked values; raw export and replay features must be enabled per session.

home.title: Inspect an authentication flow
home.lede: Enter a web application URL. AuthLens helps you visualize and document how its authentication works — you sign in, we observe.
home.noticeBody: Use AuthLens for internal debugging, QA, documentation, and authentication flow analysis. Unauthorized use against third-party services may violate laws or terms of service.
home.startCardLede: AuthLens will open a browser session for the URL below. Sign in normally — we record requests, responses, cookies, and storage changes.
home.recentEmpty: Start by entering a web application URL. AuthLens will help you visualize and document its authentication flow.
home.errorScheme: Only http and https URLs are supported.
home.errorInvalid: That does not look like a valid URL.

capture.title: Recording session
capture.lede: Sign in on the browser window. AuthLens is observing requests, responses, and storage changes. No automation is performed.
capture.ledeBackend: A separate Chromium window is now open. Sign in there — AuthLens is recording every request, response, cookie, and storage change.
capture.ledePreview: This build runs without the Playwright backend, so the network feed below is simulated for UI preview. Launch AuthLens via Tauri (`npm run tauri:dev`) to record a real session.
capture.previewBody: The browser window and real network capture require the Tauri backend. Open the demo flow from Home to see the analysis pipeline on synthetic data.
capture.backendBody: Look for the new Chromium window. Complete the login or any flow you want to document, then click Stop Capture to analyze.
capture.noActive: No active capture. Start one from the Home page.

analysis.title: Authentication summary
analysis.noActive: No analysis yet. Run a capture or open the demo flow from Home.
analysis.mermaidHint: Rendered from the captured flow. Markdown / JSON exports include the source.

report.title: Export the documentation
report.lede: Review the report before sharing. The exported file masks sensitive values by default.
report.noActive: No report yet. Open a captured flow from Home or Analysis first.
report.rawWarning: ⚠ Raw sensitive values are included. Only share with authorized reviewers.
report.rawUnavailable: This capture was loaded from local storage, so raw values were stripped before persistence. Run a fresh capture to see raw values.

settings.title: Capture & masking policy
settings.lede: Defaults err on the side of safety: small body capture limit, masked sensitive values, and disabled experimental features.
settings.revealRawDesc: Pre-selects the “Include raw values” option in the Report view. Raw values are always held in memory while the app is running, but are stripped before persistence to local storage and excluded from exports unless this option is on.
settings.revealRawWarning: ⚠ Open reports may show raw sensitive values. Review before sharing screenshots or exports.
settings.headfulDesc: Required for manual login. Disabling is rarely useful.
settings.experimentalDesc: Off by default. Read the safety notes in the documentation before enabling.
settings.replayDesc: Replay sends the selected request to a mock endpoint after stripping sensitive values. Never replays against the original origin automatically.
settings.languageDesc: Switch UI language. Takes effect immediately.
settings.dataDesc: Captures are stored locally. Delete them anytime.
settings.deleteAllConfirm: This will remove every saved capture. This cannot be undone.

reportContent.title: {{tool}} Report
reportContent.disclaimer: Generated by {{tool}} v{{version}} (schema {{schema}}). Sensitive values are masked by default.
reportContent.noLoginCandidate1: No clear authentication request was detected.
reportContent.noLoginCandidate2: You can manually select a request from the timeline.
reportContent.noCookieChanges: No cookie changes were detected during this capture.
reportContent.noSecurityNotes: No specific security notes raised for this capture.
reportContent.footer: {{tool}} is intended for authorized systems only. Review this report before sharing.
